name: Brandi
breed: Labrador Retriever & American Staffordshire Terrier Mix
story: Brandi is a loving, 60‑lb adult dog who spent five months at a city shelter before being rescued. She is affectionate but can be sensitive to loud noises and would do best in a calm home. She gets along with dogs and cats but should meet any animals in the new home first. Brandi loves people but may be too playful for very small children. She has seasonal allergies and requires an application before meeting her. Her foster says she is well‑adjusted and happy with a routine.

name: 24-063 Juno
story: Juno is an adult female bull terrier located in MA. She is affectionate, playful and loves to explore; her curious nature sometimes gets her into adventures. Juno loves humans but is selective with other dogs and should be the only pet or meet any dogs carefully. Her prey drive may be triggered by small animals. She would be a fun and loyal companion for an experienced owner.

name: 24-103 Monty
story: Monty is a two‑year‑old bull terrier who loves to snuggle and help with household projects. He enjoys walking on grass and snow, is food‑motivated and even enjoys baths. Monty communicates his needs with vocalizations and appreciates personal space sometimes. He gets along with other dogs but not cats. He is looking for a home where he can be part of the family and continue his training.

name: 25-088 Ez
story: Ez is a spunky senior bull terrier located in MO. Despite her age, she has plenty of energy and a mischievous personality. Ez loves human interaction and cuddling and would prefer to be the only pet in the household. She is eager for a family who will appreciate her quirky nature and give her a comfortable retirement.

name: Jimmy
story: Jimmy, formerly known as King, is a six‑year‑old boxer–American bulldog mix who was saved minutes before euthanasia. He is housebroken, crate‑trained and knows several commands such as ‘sit,’ ‘stay,’ ‘wait,’ and ‘leave it.’ Jimmy has good leash manners but may tug when excited and responds well to a gentle voice or treat. He was attacked by two dogs in the past, so he requires a meet‑and‑greet with any potential canine companions. Jimmy loves toys, enjoys treats and would do best with older children. He is affectionate and loyal and ready for a forever home.

name: 25-067 Bodger
story: Bodger is a young bull terrier with a big personality. He needs to be the only pet in the household and longs for a loving home where he can be the center of attention. Bodger is currently boarding and dreams of having his own family to shower with affection. He is energetic and thrives on human companionship.
